task: Assemble one piece of a puzzle
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white puzzle piece lies on a marble-patterned table. A blue puzzle box is nearby, with its lid open. The piece is small and flat, likely made of cardboard. STRATEGY - First, grasp the puzzle piece to pick it up. Then, transport it to the open puzzle box. Finally, place the piece inside the box. Failure modes include dropping the piece during transport or misaligning it with the box's interior. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the puzzle piece at its body. Step 2: Grasp the piece at its body for a secure hold. Step 3: Transport the piece to the open puzzle box. Step 4: Place the piece inside the box.
Goal: inside(puzzle_piece, puzzle_box)
Scene: puzzle_piece, puzzle_box, table
Step 1: reach(puzzle_piece)
  affordance_region: the body of the white puzzle piece
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, puzzle_piece, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, puzzle_piece) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(puzzle_piece)
  affordance_region: the body of the white puzzle piece
  contact: holding(puzzle_piece) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(puzzle_piece)
Step 3: transport(puzzle_piece -> puzzle_box)
  affordance_region: the open interior of the blue puzzle box
  spatial: above(puzzle_piece, puzzle_box, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(puzzle_piece)
  done_when: above(puzzle_piece, puzzle_box, 0.05)
Step 4: place(puzzle_piece -> puzzle_box)
  affordance_region: the open interior of the blue puzzle box
  contact: surface_contact(puzzle_piece, puzzle_box) [completion]; released(puzzle_piece) [completion]
  pose: inside(puzzle_piece, puzzle_box) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(puzzle_piece, puzzle_box) AND released(puzzle_piece)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white puzzle piece
the body of the white puzzle piece
the open interior of the blue puzzle box
the open interior of the blue puzzle box
